notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Troy Johnston out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz. Edouard Julien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick reaches on a fielding error by first baseman TJ Rumfield. Jake Bauers scores. Blake Perkins scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick reaches on a fielding error by first baseman TJ Rumfield. Jake Bauers scores. Blake Perkins scores.

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braxton Fulford called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz. Edouard Julien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz. Edouard Julien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Rockies challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Blas Castaño picks off Sal Frelick at 1st on throw to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers steals (5) 3rd base. Blake Perkins steals (3) 2nd base.
